zh.Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Courtenay於1427年出生在英國可瓦爾波康諾可時，他的父親Sir Hugh Courtenay68歲，母親Matilda de Beaumont28歲。他和Margaret Carminow至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他於1446年被列為mp for cornwall。他去世於1471年5月4日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年44歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿希沃特。

zh-hans.Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Courtenay于1427年出生在英国可瓦爾波康諾可时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Courtenay68岁，母亲Matilda de Beaumont28岁。他和Margaret Carminow至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他于1446年被列为mp for cornwall。他去世于1471年5月4日在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年44岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿希沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Courtenay was born in 1427, in Boconnoc, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Hugh Courtenay, was 68 and his mother, Matilda de Beaumont, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Margaret Carminow. In 1446, his occupation is listed as mp for cornwall. He died on 4 May 1471, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Ashwater, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Courtenay est né en 1427, à Boconnoc, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Courtenay, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Beaumont, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Margaret Carminow. En 1446, sa profession de son indiquée est mp for cornwall. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1471, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Ashwater, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Courtenay 1427 in Boconnoc, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Courtenay 68 und seine Mutter Matilda de Beaumont 28. Er hatte mit Margaret Carminow mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1446 ist sein Beruf als mp for cornwall aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Mai 1471 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Ashwater, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Courtenay è nato il nel 1427 nel Boconnoc, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Courtenay, aveva 68 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Beaumont, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Margaret Carminow. Nel 1446, la sua occupazione è indicata come mp for cornwall. Morì il 4 maggio 1471, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashwater, Devon, England.

ja.Bottreux, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.Boconnoc, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルボコノック
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Courtenayが1427年にイギリスコルンワルボコノックで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Courtenayは68歳，母Matilda de Beaumontは28歳であった。彼はMargaret Carminowとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。1446年，職業はmp for cornwallと記録されている。彼は1471年5月4日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで44歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアシュワターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Courtenay(이)가 1427년 영국 코른월 보코노크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Courtenay(은)는 68세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Beaumont(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Margaret Carminow(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1446년, 그의 직업은 mp for cornwall이었다. 그는 1471년 5월 4일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 애슈왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.1442–1450: de 10 de janeiro de 1442 a 9 de janeiro de 1451
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Courtenay nasceu em 1427, em Boconnoc, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Courtenay, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Beaumont, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Margaret Carminow. Em 1446, sua profissão aparece como mp for cornwall. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1471, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashwater, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Courtenay родился в 1427 г. в местности боконнок, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Courtenay было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Beaumont, 28. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Margaret Carminow. В 1446 году он работал по профессии mp for cornwall. Он умер 4 мая 1471 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности ашвэитир, девон, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Margaret Carminow. En 1446, su ocupación registrada era mp for cornwall. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1471, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Ashwater, Devon, Inglaterra.
